CustomSetting.Description: 3DSMax Shim Layer Control (D3D9 Vista/Win7)

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Enable - Enable the 3DSMax shim layer on Quadro and GeForce SMB GPUs
Enable GEFORCE - Enable the 3DSMax shim layer on GeForce and Quadro (DEVELOP/DEBUG only)

CustomSetting.Description: A shim for DX1x app bugs workarounds

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DX11_FORCE_DDI_CRITICAL_SECTION - Force a critical section on all non-reentrant DX11 DDI
DX11_FORCE_DDI_CRITICAL_SECTION_FOR_STEREO - Force a critical section on all non-reentrant DX11 DDI if stereo shim is enabled

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Compat". This setting is used for compatibility handling, application-specific workarounds, or executable matching behavior.
Controls the NVIDIA driver behavior associated with "G-SYNC Compatibility". This setting is used for compatibility handling, application-specific workarounds, or executable matching behavior.

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL App SET WGL Compatibility Hwnd Thread Mismatch
CustomSetting.Description: Do accept opengl calls with HDCs created by another process than the current one

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Enabled - Do accept opengl calls with HDCs created by another process than the current one

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "OpenGL GLS Compatibility". This setting is used for compatibility handling, application-specific workarounds, or executable matching behavior.

Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "OpenGL Multisample Compatibility". This setting is used for compatibility handling, application-specific workarounds, or executable matching behavior.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: USE_HW_DEFAULT - Select hardware default based on capabilities

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Shim Rendering Mode Options Per Application For Optimus
CustomSetting.Description: Rendering Mode Options for shim layer per application

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DEFAULT_RENDERING_MODE - No overrides for Shim rendering methods
DISABLE_ASYNC_PRESENT - Disable Async Presents (for video apps on DX shim to begin with)
EHSHELL_DETECT - Video shim - specific, detect App as WMC, use customized present path
FLASHPLAYER_HOST_DETECT - Video shim - specific, App can use flash, use customized present path
IGNORE_OVERRIDES - Ignore Right-click Overrides for this app
ENABLE_DWM_ASYNC_PRESENT - Enable async present for DWM ON desktop scheme
ALLOW_INHERITANCE - Benchmarks or Test suites that launch other standalone apps but with the suite's GPU Preference
PRUNE_UNSUPPORTED_FORMATS - Prune NV formats unsupported on intel
ENABLE_ALPHA_FORMAT - Replace X8R8G8B8 with A8R8G8B8 for autocad application group
ALLOW_CP_CAPS_FOR_VIDEO - Allow UMD Shim to return Content Protection Caps for video playback
IGPU_TRANSCODING_FWD_OPTIMUS - Enable IGPU Transcoding on FWD Optimus configs only
DISABLE_DURING_SECURE_BOOT - Disable this app (force to iGPU) if booting in secure boot mode with incompatible drivers
INVERT_FOR_QUADRO - Used only by CPL to allow app run on the DGPU when it detects Quadro GPU. (used for MobileMark2012)
INVERT_FOR_MSHYBRID - Used only by CPL to invert suggested GPU for an app between MSHybrid and NV Optimus
REGISTER_PROCESS_ENABLE_GOLD - Identifies if the given app doesn't need to turn on dGPU for its entire lifetime (but it might use it for querying, e.g. fmsiscan.exe)
HANDLE_WINDOWED_MODE_PERF_OPT - Handle Windowed mode perf optimization of creating alternate back buffer to avoid corruption due to app bugs
HANDLE_WIN7_ASYNC_RUNTIME_BUG - Disable Async Presents on Win7 Only to hide a Dx10 runtime bug
EXPLICIT_ADAPTER_OPTED_BY_APP - Explicit Adapter opted by App for rendering
ALLOW_DYNAMIC_DISPLAY_MUX_SWITCH - Allow Dynamic Display Mux switch from IGPU to dGPU for this app
DISALLOW_DYNAMIC_DISPLAY_MUX_SWITCH - Dis-allow Dynamic Display Mux switch from IGPU to dGPU for this app
DISABLE_TURING_POWER_POLICY - Disable Turing Power Policy for apps like SearchUI.exe, Desktop Components or some OEMs apps which hampers Laptop Battery Life due to keeping GPU ON for app's lifetime

CustomSetting.Description: Enable or disable asynchronous presents when the multithreaded driver is used

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Force Async full screen - Only full screen DX9 presents will be asynchronous
Sync - All DX9 presents will be synchronous
Async full screen - Only full screen DX9 presents will be asynchronous if AllowFlipBatching is set
Force Async - All DX9 presents will be asynchronous
Async - All DX9 presents will be asynchronous if AllowFlipBatching is set

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Background Application Max Frame Rate For Nvcpl
CustomSetting.Description: Background Application Max Frame Rate for NVCPL
Controls the NVIDIA driver behavior associated with "Buffer Flipping Mode". This setting affects presentation timing, frame pacing, refresh policy, or synchronization behavior.

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Configure Dynamic FPS Feature Mode As Dynamic Frame Rate Limiter Mode
CustomSetting.Description: Controls the NVIDIA driver behavior associated with "Configure Dynamic FPS Feature Mode As Dynamic Frame Rate Limiter Mode". This setting affects presentation timing, frame pacing, refresh policy, or synchronization behavior.
Framerate Limiter parameters, bit 31 to enable and LOWBYTE set to frames/sec

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: FPS_20 - Framerate set to 20 frames per sec
FPS_30 - Framerate set to 30 frames per sec
FPS_40 - Framerate set to 40 frames per sec
ALLOW_DYNAMIC - Allow limit to be set dynamically
YIELD_PROCESSOR - Use YieldProcessor() for accurate CPU wait, instead of Sleep(0)
FORCE_VSYNC_OFF - Force VSYNC OFF if this bit is set.
NO_LAG_OFFSET - Do not apply offset to account for observed lag
ACCURATE - Accurate setting of fps but higer CPU usage
ALLOW_WINDOWED - Allow limiting of windowed applications
FORCEON - Force enable, ignore AC/DC status
LOW_LATENCY_DEFAULT - Setting used for low latency
OPENGL_REMOTE_DESKTOP - Setting used for OpenGL Remote Desktop Sessions
MFR_FLAGS - Setting used for max frame rate
MASK - Mask of all bits used

CustomSetting.Description: Framerate Limiter 2 controls (deprecated)
Framerate Limiter FPS only for NVCPL to maintain the previous slider value when the FRL_FPS is set to Disabled.
FRM parameters (deprecated)
FRM control parameters

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: FPS_USE_FRL - Enable FRM only when FRL is enabled (default)
MOVING_AVG_X_MASK - Number of frames to apply moving average over
VSYNC_OFFSET_MASK - offset to target in 0.25ms for VSYNC mode
FRL_OFFSET_MASK - offset to target in 0.25ms for FRL mode
LOW_LATENCY_LOG - Enable data collection for low latency.
DISABLE_MAP_GPU_TIMER - Use GPU Timer registers to get GPU timestamps
OPTIMAL_SETTING_V2 - Optimal settings (no VSYNC mode) V2
ENABLE_ON_VSYNC - Enable FRM when (adaptive) VSYNC is ON
VSYNC_OPTIMAL_SETTING_V2 - Optimal settings (with VSYNC mode) V2
FPS_30 - Enable FRM at 30 FPS regardless of FRL
FPS_60 - Enable FRM at 60 FPS regardless of FRL
FPS_MASK - Enable FRM at target FPS

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL Lddm MT Vertical Sync Wait Method

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DXGKRNL_WAIT - Use Dxgkrnl to block on the vsync event

DRIVER_DECIDE - The driver chooses the best wait method

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "OpenGL Tearing Free Swap Present". This setting affects presentation timing, frame pacing, refresh policy, or synchronization behavior.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: MOST _VISIBLE_PIXELS - client with most visible pixels
MODE_NO_SPANNING - client can not be in span mode
DONT_INVALIDATE_RECT_BEFORE_PRESENT - Don't call InvalidateRect before swapping
PRE_SWAP_WAIT - Wait on the HW flip event for frame N when swapbuffers is called for frame N+1
SYNC_SEMAPHORE - Create an overaly surface which will receive be the semaphore surface shared between KMD present blit and HW flip

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Default DX present policy for MSHybrid configurations
CustomSetting.Description: Controls default DX present policy for MSHybrid configurations. Note that disabling DX present here does not prevent it from getting enabled for some other reason (e.g. HDR). RS2 is the first version that supports Win7-blit (providing effecient MSHybrid support). RS4 is the first version with a fix for diagonal tearing bug 200050074.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLE - Disable DX present (still allowed for hdr).
USE_WIN7_BLIT_FOR_GDI_COMPAT - Disable DX present when GDI compatibility needed for MSHybrid on Win10 >= RS2 (see OGL_ENABLE_GDI_COMPATIBILITY/__lhglDetermineGdiCompatibility).
DISABLE_RS4 - Disable DX present on Win10 >= RS4.

ENABLE - VirtualProtect WW enable heap lock

ENABLE - Enable the Geometry Shader optimization.

CustomSetting.Description: Limits hardware to use only a fraction of the total SM count for SCG (simultaneous compute and graphics). A value of 0x100 means to use all SMs.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: MIN - Allow 0% of all SMs to be used for SCG (rounded up to 1 SM)
DEFAULT - Default - 40% of SMs to be used for SCG
MAX - Allow up to 100% of all SMs to be used for SCG.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: VERTEX - Force zero initialization of outputs in vertex shaders.
FRAGMENT - Force zero initialization of outputs in fragment shaders.
GEOMETRY - Force zero initialization of outputs in geometry shaders.
TESS_CONTROL - Force zero initialization of outputs in tessellation control shaders.
TESS_EVALUATION - Force zero initialization of outputs in tessellation evaluation shaders.
ALL_STAGES - Force zero initialization of outputs in all shader stagess.

AT_PIXEL_CENTER - depth values used are from the pixel center when multisample is disabled

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the flipping behaviour on Windows8+

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: ALLOW_APP_ACTIVATE_MSG - Allow flipping on WM_ACTIVATEAPP message
ALLOW_APP_NON_FOREGROUND - Allow flipping when the app is not in the foreground
ALLOW_APP_WRONG_STYLE - Allow flipping when the app has the wrong style
DISABLE_EXCLUSING_MODE_MUTEX - Do not take the exclusive mode mutex when going into fullscreen
DISABLE_VIDPN_VIS - Do not blank the heads unnecessarily (unimplemented)
ENABLE_PER_HEAD_FULLSCREEN_CHECKS - Loop over all heads instead of only checking the device desktop rect
DISABLE_INVALIDATE_RECT - Do not use invalidate rect on enabling or disabling flipping
DISABLE_FLICKER_WAR - Remove WAR for multiple heads (could interact with vidpn_vis above eventually)
ALLOW_DEEPCOLOR_MULTIMON - Allow flipping of deepColor client in multimon config (deepColor window is part of desktop)
DISABLE_ZORDER_CHANGE - Do not disable flipping if a z-order window change occurs.
DISABLE_MENU_DETECTION - Do not disable flipping if a menu is detected as visible.
DISABLE_NCDESTROY - Do not disable flipping if a WM_NCDESTROY is seen.
ALLOW_DMW_CLONE - Allow flipping in dwm clone (where each head has its own allocation).
ALLOW_MONO_DBL_W_STEREO_VIBRANIUM - Allow flipping with mono drawable when workstation stereo is enabled on Vibranium.

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Vulkan Present and Swapchain Behavior

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: WDDM_ZCFLIP_DISABLE - Force disable of zero-copy flip for WDDM
WDDM_ZCFLIP_ENABLE - Force enable of zero-copy flip for WDDM
WDDM_ZCFLIP_FORCE_ASYNCBLIT - Force zero-copy flip to use ASYNCBLIT
WDDM_SCG_DISABLE - Force disallow present on async compute for WDDM
WDDM_SCG_ENABLE - Force allow present on async compute for WDDM
X11_ZCFLIP_DISABLE - Force disable zero-copy flip for X11
X11_ZCFLIP_ENABLE - Force enable zero-copy flip for X11
X11_SCG_DISABLE - Force disallow present on async compute for X11
X11_SCG_ENABLE - Force allow present on async compute for X11
WDDM_NO_ASYNC_CONTEXT - Debug: WDDM executes present flip in the VkQueue's HW context

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Lock to rated TDP under PS2.0
CustomSetting.Description: Lock to rated TDP under PS2.0
Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "OpenGL Setting 0x2089A332". This setting affects driver scheduling, memory policy, compute behavior, or system-level feature control.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: FORCE_DISABLE - Perf strat zcull force disable
FORCE_ENABLE - Perf strat zcull force enable
FORCE_Z_ONLY - Perf strat zcull force Z only
FORCE_ZS - Perf strat zcull force ZS
FORCE_Z4X2 - Perf strat zcull force Z4X2
FORCE_ZS_NVPR - Perf strat zcull force ZS with NVpr settings

CustomSetting.Description: This is a debugging regkey to switch among three vsync behavior modes under Gsync setup

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLED - Cap G-Sync FPS at max refresh. Prevent tearing.
APP_CONTROL_TEAR_FLAG - Allow G-Sync FPS > max refresh with tearing when swapInterval = 0 (managed by OGL)
APP_CONTROL - Allow G-Sync FPS > max refresh with tearing when swapInterval = 0 (managed by DD)

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Heuristic for using pixbar in shaders
CustomSetting.Description: Controls the heuristic for using pixbar in shaders

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DEFAULT - Driver manages the pixbar mode.
PS_FORCE_OFF - pixbar is always disabled in pixel shaders
PS_FORCE_ON - pixbar is always enbled in pixel shaders

CustomSetting.Description: Enable/Disable WAR for HW bug 972630 for experimentation.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DRIVER_DEFAULT - Use the driver default behavior
ENABLE_ONE_NOP - Enable the WAR with 1 pipe-nop after every constant buffer change
ENABLE_THREE_NOP - Enable the WAR with 3 pipe-nops after every constant buffer change
ENABLE_EIGHT_NOP - Enable the WAR with 8 pipe-nops after every constant buffer change
ENABLE_TEN_NOP - Enable the WAR with 10 pipe-nops after every constant buffer change

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - AND the sampler and image descriptor handles with 0xFFF00000 and 0xFFFFF respectively before combining them
CustomSetting.Description: AND the sampler and image descriptor handles with 0xFFF00000 and 0xFFFFF respectively before combining them.
Max. size in bytes for using separate sysmem copy of user data to avoid a Sync. Above this limit, we pass user ptr and force a Sync to avoid sysmem copy. Currently only used for BufferSubData.
Controls driver behavior for memory overallocation.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: ALLOW_ON_PRE_TURING - Allow overallocation on Maxwell2+ - compression will be disabled
NO_SYSMEM_PROMOTION - Don't allow unmapped sysmem to be automatically promoted to vidmem when vidmem overallocation is enabled

CustomSetting.Description: Controls default Vulkan robustness behavior.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLED - Disable robustness by default, ignoring VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures.robustBufferAccess.
ENABLED - Enable robustness by default, so bad applications can run.
USE_ROBUST_BUFFER_ACCESS - Enable robustness only if application asks for it by way of VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures.robustBufferAccess.
USE_PIPELINE_ROBUSTNESS - Use VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures.robustBufferAccess only if app is using VK_EXT_pipeline_robustness, otherwise enable robustness.

CustomSetting.Description: Control use of OpenGL in Remote Desktop

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: AUTOSELECT - Pick FULL or PARTIAL based on the GPU's in the system
FULL - Also accelerate applications launched from the remote session
PARTIAL - Only accelerate applications launched locally

CustomSetting.Description: Controls whether we override aspect's VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_STENCIL_BIT to set When choosing a path to fulfill VkCmdCopyImage call with on VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_DEPTH_BIT set in aspect and at least one of the source image and destination image in depth/stencil interleaved format. When enabled, we actually use compute copy to copy both depth component and stencil component for better performance. Make sure not breaking application's functionality before enable this.
Adds limits to memory made resident by bindless functions

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Maximal reconvergence in GLV on Volta+, using vote and warpsync
CustomSetting.Description: Enables maximal reconvergence in GLV on Volta+, using vote and warpsync

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: USE_ROOT_TABLE - Use root table constant buffers. Where HW permits, this takes precedence over USE_VPC
USE_VPC - Use memory from the driver constant buffer

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "OpenGL Setting 0x20A3D20D". This setting affects driver scheduling, memory policy, compute behavior, or system-level feature control.

CustomSetting.Description: Minimize VRAM paging by limiting buffer object VRAM use to memory available at application startup

CustomSetting.Description: For VRAM sized memory blocks, table size required to represent all memory blocks

When ON, the default render GPU for same-quadro HW configs is determined by position of the window associated with the HDC passed to SetPixelFormat. When OFF, or when not a same-quadro HW config, the default is determined by OGL_IMPLICIT_GPU_AFFINITY. The use of gpu_affinity always overrides the default. This feature is exposed on vista and newer.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: OFF - Use a heuristic to select the default render GPU.
ON - Use HDC-based selection of the default render GPU on supported HW configs.
FORCE_ON - Use HDC-based selection of the default render GPU for any HW config.

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "OpenGL Setting 0x20AB097B". This setting affects driver scheduling, memory policy, compute behavior, or system-level feature control.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: FASTFAIL - call __fastfail() if supported, otherwise fallback to RAISEEXCEPTION

CustomSetting.Description: Some applications render GDI on top OpenGL content. There is limited support for this with blit model, but with flip model (can be used by dxPresent path), mixing GDI and other rendering is not supported. In fact the first flip model present to a window permanently disables GDI rendering support for that window. Enabling mixing here prevents the dxPresent path from using flip model when possible (note that diagonal tearing is possible due to bug 200050074). Enabling this is not necessary for applications that use a SUPPORT_GDI pixelformat.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: AUTO - Use driver heuristic to determine mode.

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Constant Folding Pipeline Time Threshold
CustomSetting.Description: Lower bound on the average amount of time (in us) that must be spent in a pipeline for the profiler to consider it worthwhile for constant folding

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Maximum Pipeline Passes Per Second
CustomSetting.Description: Maximum number of passes to process per second.
Controls if vkCmdCopy* functions use TWOD, PSHADER, or COMPUTE in this order where applicable

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: PSHADER_ON - Allow converting suitable CmdCopyImage into CmdBlitImage to use pixel shader
TWOD_AUTO - Only allow TWOD based on HW bug and perf

CustomSetting.Description: Defines pixel format used for OGL depth stencil buffer

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: HONOR_DEDICATED - Allow dedicated allocations for DEPTH_STENCIL
IGNORE_DEDICATED - Ignore Vulkan dedicated allocation requests for DEPTH-STENCIL

CustomSetting.Description: Control the behavior of fragment shader KIL instructions.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: EXIT_NONE - Don't terminate any shaders executing a KIL instruction.
EXIT_GLSL - Terminate GLSL shaders executing KIL instructions (technically required by the spec).
EXIT_ASM - Terminate assembly shaders executing KIL instructions (not required).

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "OpenGL Setting 0x20B5F2B2". This setting affects driver scheduling, memory policy, compute behavior, or system-level feature control.

CustomSetting.Description: Controls whether oversubscription of the host-visible heap automatically retries in sysmem rather than failing the allocation. For use as WAR for certain applications.

Compatibility setting that maintains old incorrect vkGetDeviceProcAddr behavior

ENABLE - vkGetDeviceProcAddr will also return all available Vulkan procs.

CustomSetting.Description: Controls OCG floating point optimization behavior
Controls clear behavior on layout transition from undefined layout

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: HW_DEFAULT - enable on HW that needs it
FORCE_ENABLE_ALLOW_TRANSFER_QUEUE - enable on all HW, also for layout transition submitted to transfer queue
HW_DEFAULT_ALLOW_TRANSFER_QUEUE - enable on HW that needs it, also for layout transition submitted to transfer queue

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Barrier Deferral with Transfer Operations
CustomSetting.Description: Controls deferral of barriers interleaved with transfer ops

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: MAX_REGIONS_MASK - number of transfer regions to track before flushing deferred barriers. 0 is disable
INCLUDE_TIMESTAMP - defer barriers for CmdWriteTimestamp (debug setting)
INCLUDE_SPARSE - defer barriers for buffers with SPARSE_ALIASED_BIT (debug setting)

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Forced Compiler Options and Optimizations
CustomSetting.Description: Control which compiler options/optimizations are force enabled/disabled.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: ALL_DEFAULT - Set all values to driver default
HIGH_LATENCY_HOIST_ENABLE - Force enable High Latency Hoist
HIGH_LATENCY_HOIST_DISABLE - Force disable High Latency Hoist
PARTIAL_LOOP_UNROLL_ENABLE - Force enable Partial Loop Unrolling
PARTIAL_LOOP_UNROLL_DISABLE - Force disable Partial Loop Unrolling
FULL_LOOP_UNROLL_ENABLE - Force enable Full Loop Unrolling
FULL_LOOP_UNROLL_DISABLE - Force disable Full Loop Unrolling
POST_UNROLL_HOIST_ENABLE - Force enable Post Unroll Hoist
POST_UNROLL_HOIST_DISABLE - Force disable Post Unroll Hoist
SWITCH_JUMP_TABLE_ENABLE - Force enable allowing switches to be lowered to a jump table
SWITCH_JUMP_TABLE_DISABLE - Force disable allowing switches to be lowered to a jump table

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Async Blit State Handle Threshold
CustomSetting.Description: Threshold of allocated state handles where we allow async blit to be initialized.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: TWENTY - Allow async blit when there are <= 20 state handles.

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Pixels From Memory Downsample Usage
CustomSetting.Description: Toggle the usage of Pixels From Memory(PFM) for downsamples.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLE - Disable use of Pixels From Memory.
ENABLE - Enable use of Pixels From Memory on hardware that supports the feature.

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Force Early-Z Without Fragment Shader
CustomSetting.Description: Controls whether to force early-z for draw calls with no fragment shader. Potentially useful if an app is limited by transitions between early-z and late-z.
Control whether shader constant folding is enabled and for which stages

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLE - Disable shader constant folding (except by explicit hash list)
TESS_CONTROL - Enable for tessellation control shaders
TESS_EVALUATION - Enable for tessellation evaluation shaders
FORCE_DISABLE - Disable entirely, even for shaders listed in VK_CONSTANT_FOLDING_HASH_LIST

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Constant Folding Tracking Pass Count
CustomSetting.Description: Number of tracking passes a uniform needs to keep the same value before being constant folded

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Constant Folding Validation Failure Threshold
CustomSetting.Description: Minimum percentage of validation attempts that must fail before optimization is aborted and tracking begins again

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Constant Folding Uniform Count Threshold
CustomSetting.Description: Minimum number of uniforms a shader must have for it to be analyzed for optimization
Controls whether the host-visible vidmem type and heap (DEVICE_LOCAL | HOST_VISIBLE | HOST_COHERENT) are exposed through the Vulkan API.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: ENABLE_LARGE_BAR1_ONLY - Enabled only for configs with BAR1 >= FB size

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL - Affects driver teardown behavior when
CustomSetting.Description:
Affects driver teardown behavior when (lpReserved != NULL), which
indicates that one or more thread may have been terminated prior to
PROCESS_DETACH. In this case attempting to clean up has undefined
results, including the possibility of a hang or a crash.

PTE_COALESCING_DISABLE - Disable PTE coalescing, this fails in G8X and G9X chips
CLAW_DISABLE_DISPLAY_LIST - Disable the usage of CLAW in display lists
MEMORY_MAP_NOT_REQUIRED - Disables the mapping of video memory to system memory, consumes too much in Vista
CONSTANT_OPTIMIZE - Optimize based on constant values
LAZY_VBUM_VBOS - Enable the Lazy VBUM optimization for VBOS

HIDE_FLOAT_COLOR_IF_NO_TWO_SIDED - Hide float color extensions (GL_ARB_color_buffer_float; GLX_ARB_fbconfig_float for X11,/GLX; WGL_ARB_pixel_format_float for Windows/WGL) if GPU resorts to software fallback possible due to lack of twoâ€”sided lighting support (only on NV4x/G7x)
VPWW_ALLOW_LATE_ALLOCED - In VirtualProtectWriteWatch, allow late allotions
HIDE_GL3_ON_G80_PLUS - When set, advertise OpenGL 2.1 for G80+ GPUs Gnstead of OpenGL 3.0)
NO_PFD_SUPPORT_GDI - Final override for exporting PFD_SUPPORT_GDI. If this bit is set, PFD_SUPPORT_GDI will not be set, regardless of OGL_PfdAdjust or OGL_VistaControlFlags values
DISABLE_TXL_LOD_WAR - disables TXL LOD WAR for HW bug
COPYPIXEL_FRONTBUFFER_FLUSH - Force a flush after copypixels to the front buffer

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Disabled - VRAM address passed directly back to the application, may not survive mode switch
Enabled - Virtual Address created for VBUM card references, safer for mode switching

CustomSetting.Description: This app benefits greatly from vidmem pushbuffers

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Enabled - This app benefits greatly from vidmem pushbuffers

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: OpenGL App Vpww Allow Late Alloced

Controls whether portability warnings of shaders without '#version' directives are treated as errors.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: False - Default driver behavior (old setting, used by NVEmulate)
True - Enabled for all profiles and all shaders (old setting, used by NVEmulate).
Disabled always - Disabled for all profiles and all shaders (only for debug and to avoid breaking shipping apps).
Enabled For Version - Enabled for shaders with #version; disabled otherwise
Enabled For Core or Version - Enabled when using the core and ES profiles, or for shaders with #version; disabled otherwise.
Enabled always - Enabled for all profiles and all shaders

Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "OpenGL Thread Control 2". This setting affects driver scheduling, memory policy, compute behavior, or system-level feature control.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DUMP_STATS - Creates files in C: that contain various stream statistics.
IGNORE_GET_ERROR - glGetError always returns NO_ERROR, skips the sync.
TOKENIZER_USE_EVENT_ON_LOAD - Forces the tokenizer to use events to wait for the player if a hyperthreaded system is on high load
PLAYER_USE_SPIN - Allows the player to spin when waiting for commands
FORCE_CACHE_SHARING - Set thread affinity to run app and game within a shared cache.
FORCE_CACHE_SEPERATION Set thread affinity to run app and game on seperate caches.
FORCE_HT_SEPERATION - Set thread affinity to avoid running driver and app on one hyperthreads of one core.
SHOW_INDICATOR - Draw an indicator on screen to show whether dual-core is running or not.
PLAYER_HTT_NO_OPTIIMIZE - This will disable HTT optimizations i.e. shifting threads around cores
PLAYER_HTT_RUN_AWAY_GROUP - When the player thread runs away, bind it to a group of cores. Otherwise, only choose a single core
PLAYER_HTT_RUN_AWAY_ONCE - If set, this means the player thread can only run away from the tokenizer thread once. Otherwise, it will constantly check
PLAYER_NO_VOTING_LOCK - Don't allow voting to dynamially lock the worker thread onto a core
ENABLE_QUADRO_DC - Turn on the DC driver on Quadro
FORCE_SYNC_VACACHE - Force a Sync on each BindVertexArray
DISABLE_TIMER - Disable front/backend timers normally used to disable threading when not effective
IGNORE_OCCLUSION - Ignore GetQuery for occlusion tests, always return TRUE
TRACK_CURRENT_COLOR - Track current color in the app thread to speed glGetFloat requests
TRACK_CURRENT_MVP_MATRIX - Track current MVP matrix in the app thread to speed glGetFloat requests
TRACK_CURRENT_FB_BINDING - Track current FB bindings to avoid syncs in glGetIntegerv
CONVERT_MAPBUFFERRANGE - Convert glMapBufFerRange/glUnmapBuffer sequences to glBufferSubData.
ASSUME_MAP_INVALIDATE - Assume that the app does not expect valid content when calling glMapBufferRange (as if GL_MAP_INVALIDATE_RANGE_BIT would be set by the app).
CACHE_VERTEXARRAYNAMES - Enable vertex array name cache

CustomSetting.Description: Set this to 0 in order to prevent the creation of a suspended worker thread on Quadro

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: CACHE_GLSL_OBJECTS - Cache calls to glGetUniformLocation and glIsShader
CACHE_GL_STATE - Cache calls to glIsEnabled for a subset of state
CACHE_MATRIX - Cache Calls to glGetFloatv for GL_PROJECTION_MATRIX and GL_MODELVIEW_MATRIX
MAKE_CURRENT_ASYNC - Don't sync on DrvSetContext and DrvReleaseContext if possible. Ignores return values.
CACHE_GET_RESULTS - Cache calls to certain glGets
QUEUE_WINDOW_EVENTS - Queue window events instead of syncing
APP_THREAD_GETS - Perform certain glGet* calls in the application thread when the front and back-end threads are already synchronized.
MODIFY_TIMESTAMP - Return same value for timestamp to defeat bad algorithms that use GL_TIMESTAMP measurements for off swtiches
CACHE_DRAW_PIXEL_DATA - Cache large draw pixel data in application thread

CustomSetting.Description: Threaded optimizations for GeForce.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: CACHE_GLSL_OBJECTS - Cache calls to glGetUniformLocation and glIsShader
CACHE_GL_STATE - Cache calls to glIsEnabled for a subset of state
CACHE_MATRIX - Cache calls to glGetFloatv for GL_PROJECTION_MATRIX and GL_MODELVIEW_MATRIX
MAKE_CURRENT_ASYNC - Don't sync on DrvSetContext and DrvReleaseContext if possible. Ignores return values.

CustomSetting.Description: For Quadro on Windows OSs only, set this to 1 in order to report depth 24 / stencil 0 formats as depth 32

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Enable - For Quadro, report depth 24 / stencil 0 formats as depth 32

CustomSetting.Description: Control the amount of freed video memory the allocator reserves for reuse by future allocations. By default the allocator reserves up to 10% of the total VRAM. The units are in 1/1000ths of total heap. So 100 means 10%.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Default - Control the amount of freed video memory the allocator reserves for reuse by future allocations. By default the allocator reserves up to 10% of the total VRAM. The units are in 1/1000ths of total heap. So 100 means 10%

CustomSetting.Description: Set for PhysX applications
Controls the NVIDIA driver behavior associated with "Powerthrottle". This setting affects driver scheduling, memory policy, compute behavior, or system-level feature control.
Controls the NVIDIA driver behavior associated with "Shader Cache Control Flags 0X1d744c". This setting affects driver scheduling, memory policy, compute behavior, or system-level feature control.
Flags for shader cache

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLE_DEFAULT_COMPILES - Disables default compiles to the cache
DISABLE_OPTIONAL_COMPILES - Disables optional compiles to the cache
DISABLE_DRIVER_VERSIONING - Disables versioning of cache using driver UUID
DUMP_HISTOGRAM - Dumps histogram of shader compiles over device create/destroy
DUMP_TIMELINE - Dumps timeline of shader compiles to csv
ENABLE_ENCRYPTION - Enables encryption on the data cache
DISABLE_CRC - Disable CRC checks on the data cache
ENABLE_STATS_FILES - Enables the use of .sta files for collecting statistics about the cache across multiple runs.
DISABLE_STATS_RESET - Disables resetting cache statistics on every load
DISABLE_DEBUG_FORCED_COMPILE - ASSERT_ONLY_CODE builds compile even on cache hits, override this functionality to increase performance.
RLE_COMPRESSION - Use Run Length Encoding compression for TOCEntries
LZMA_COMPRESSION - Use Lempel-Ziv-Markov chain (7zip) compression for TOCEntries
BACKEND_MEM_MAP_FILES - Use a series of memory mapped files as the cache
BACKEND_GFN_DLL - Use a DLL provided by GFN to interface with a networked cache
BACKEND_SQLITE - Use a SQLite file as the cache
FLOOD_CACHE_DIRECTORY - On CreateDevice fill the cache directory with fake caches, simulating a full cache

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Shader Cache Control Flags For Automated Testing
CustomSetting.Description: Controls the NVIDIA driver behavior associated with "Shader Cache Control Flags For Automated Testing". This setting affects driver scheduling, memory policy, compute behavior, or system-level feature control.

Map() of staging buffer without DISCARD or NO_OVERWRITE is a problem unless we can map cached copy. Smaller values can cause uncached maps to stall but larger values incur lots of memcpy() overhead. Testing has found 8kb to be a sensible tradeoff (Outlook in sensitive to larger values). SLI uses a minimum value of 4mb.
This key is changing sysmem cached copy behavior

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Disallow - Disable sysmem caching for textures
ALLOW_FOR_TEXTURES_WITHOUT_SUBRESOURCES - Allow for textures without subresources only (default)
ALLOW_FOR_TEXTURES_WITH_SUBRESOURCES - Allow for textures with mips

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Tiled Cache Enable DX OpenGL". This setting affects driver scheduling, memory policy, compute behavior, or system-level feature control.

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Tiled Cache Enable DX OpenGL Pre 526.47
CustomSetting.Description: enable/disable tiled cache
MAXWELL_TILEDCACHE override for Vulkan.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: KEEP_PIPE_BIND_FLUSH - Keep unnecessary TC flush on pipeline bind added by WARs
IGNORE_NEW_OOODRAIN_HASHES - Ignore new OoODrainIssues hashes for TC
OOODRAIN_FRAC_MASK - Fraction/15 of frag shaders with OoODrainIssues allowed for TC, 15 is ignore
DONT_FLUSH_RENDERPASS - Don't add TC flush after renderpass
IGNORE_PRIM_MUL_CONST_VERSION - Ignore product of PRIM_LIMIT and CONSTANT_BUFFER_VERSION_LIMIT
CODE_SIZE_FLUSH_INTRA_SUBPASS_MASK - Unique frag ucode size sum multiplied by 1KB to flush inside subpass, 0 is ignore
PASCAL_DEFAULT - New heuristic for Pascal+ GPUs excluding GV11B
TURING_OR_NEWER_DEFAULT - New heuristic for Turing+ GPUs
CODE_SIZE_FLUSH_INTER_SUBPASS_MASK - Unique frag ucode size sum multiplied by 1KB to flush between subpasses, 0 is ignore

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Tiled Cache Size". This setting affects driver scheduling, memory policy, compute behavior, or system-level feature control.
Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Tiledcache L2 Usage". This setting affects driver scheduling, memory policy, compute behavior, or system-level feature control.

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Disable SLI Explicitly Set Through Nvapi
CustomSetting.Description: Disable SLI (Explicitly set through NVAPI)

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Number Of Gpus To Use On SLI Rendering Mode
CustomSetting.Description: User visible exposed number of GPUs to use on SLI

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: AUTOSELECT - The default mode, the driver will pick what's best

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Nvidia Predefined Number Of Gpus To Use On SLI Rendering Mode
CustomSetting.Description: Indicates in the NVIDIA Control Panel how many GPUs should be used by default for SLI operation

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Nvidia Predefined Number Of Gpus To Use On SLI Rendering Mode On Directx 10
CustomSetting.Description: Indicates in the NVIDIA Control Panel how many GPUs should be used by default for DirectX 10 SLI operation.
Setting to indicate in the Control Panel which SLI mode is active by default

CustomSetting.Description: Setting to indicate in the Control Panel which SLI mode is active by default on DirectX 10
multichip mode for DX10 apps for new gpus (like TU+)

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: USE_MCCOMPAT - the default value when no sli mode is set.
FORCE_2AFR - force 2-AFR rendering mode for this app
FORCE_4AFR - force N-way AFR on N-way system
FORCE_3AFR - force 2-AFR on 2-way system and 3-AFR on N-way
SLI_MODE_MASK - --- not a value. This is a mask to select sli mode enum field
OVERRIDE_BIT - makes the global profile override app's profile

CustomSetting.Description: Optimise SLI downloads using P2P transfers

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: ENABLE - Bit set to use SLI DL optimisations
PUSH - USE PUSH P2P instead of pull
LIMIT_DL - limit download to one subdivce
LIMIT_CE - limit CE to use only one engine
BASE - Enable by default with CE
SKIP_P2P - skip P2P but use rest of algorithm
ONE_2_MANY - copy from one GPU to many
CHUNKS - number of chunks to use

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "OpenGL SLI Windowed AFR". This setting affects multi-GPU rendering, workload distribution, or NVLINK/SLI behavior.
multichip app broadcast compat value for DX10 apps

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Do not use broadcast at all
DYNAMIC_BROADCAST_RENDER_TO_UAVS - driver will automatically enable broadcast on render/dispatch to UAVs that are seen to be synced between GPUs
STATIC_BROADCAST_TO_1LINE_32BIT_TEXTURES - Force broadcast on 32 bit textures which has one pixel height but more than 1 pixel width
LIMIT_BROADCAST_SPREADING_TO_ONE_LEVEL - Limit broadcast spreading only to one level up
STATIC_BROADCAST_TO_SQUARE_R16F_RTT - Broadcast rendering to square R16_FLOAT RTTs
STATIC_BROADCAST_TO_SQUARE_G32R32F_RTT - Broadcast rendering to square R32G32_FLOAT RTs

CustomSetting.Description: Additional MCCOMPAT flags for broadcast RTT

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Do not use broadcast at all
DYNAMIC_BROADCAST_RENDER_TO_TEXTURE - Dynamic broadcast render to texture to all GPUs
STICKY_BROADCAST - Preserve broadcast state once set
PROPAGATE_BROADCAST_PROHIBITION_BETWEEN_RT_AND_ZB - Mirror broadcast prohibition from RT to ZB
STATIC_BROADCAST_CLEARS_TO_TEXTURE - Broadcast clears to all GPUs
STATIC_BROADCAST_RENDER_TO_TEXTURE - Static RTT ops broadcast to all GPUs
ALLOW_BROADCAST_ON_SMALLER_HDR_SURFACES - Enable broadcast for small HDR surfaces
USE_BROADCAST_FLAGS_FROM_RT_OR_ZB - Use RT/ZB broadcast flags for decision logic
FORCE_BROADCAST_ZB_CLEAR_IF_RT_IN_BROADCAST - Force ZB clear if RT is in broadcast
IGNORE_DISCARD_ON_ZB_IF_RT_IN_BROADCAST - Skip ZB discard if RT is in broadcast
DISCARD_TEXTURING_SYNC_AFTER_BLIT_FROM_DISCARDABLE_SRC - Drop sync after blit from discardable source
BROADCAST_ON_ZB_IN_TEXTURE_ON_PARTIAL_SRT - Static broadcast on shadow map atlases
BROADCAST_ON_STENCIL_WRITE - Broadcast on ZB when stencil is written

CustomSetting.Description: Controls CFR modes and options

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: CLASSIC_SFR - enable classic split line SFR

CustomSetting.Description: multichip app compat value for DX10 apps

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: AUTOSELECT - the default value when no sli mode is set
FORCE_2AFR - force 2-AFR rendering mode for this app
FORCE_4AFR - force N-way AFR on N-way system
FORCE_3AFR - force 2-AFR on 2-way system and 3-AFR on N-way
SLI_MODE_MASK - --- not a value. This is a mask to select sli mode enum field
AFR_ONLY_APP - An app queries old sli nvapi which doesn't allow dynamic transitions. No SLIAA, no notebook power savings
DISCARD_ON_RENDERING_FOR_TEXTURES - discard content of texture RTs before rendering
DISCARD_ON_RENDERING_FOR_NON_TEXTURES - discard content of non-texture RTs before rendering
DISCARD_ZBUF_DATA_ON_RENDERING - discard content of depth buffers before rendering
DISCARD_STENCIL_DATA_ON_RENDERING - discard content of stencils buffers before rendering
DISCARD_ON_STREAM_OUT - discard content of vertex buffers before stream out
SKIP_DEFERRED_RESOLVE_OF_BOUND_VIEWS - skip deferred resolve of views that are bound, and rely on the app re-binding them to trigger a later resolve
SKIP_RESOLVE_ON_VERTEX_BUFFER - skip resolve of vertex buffers
SKIP_NON_HDR_TEXTURE_RESOLVE_MATCHED_PRIMARY - similar to SKIP_TEXTURE_RESOLVE_MATCHED_PRIMARY but we only skip if the texture isn't HDR (float16)
SKIP_TEXTURE_RESOLVE_ON_TEXTURING - don't resolve textures before texturing, really hacky bit
SKIP_TEXTURE_RESOLVE_MATCHED_PRIMARY - don't resolve before texturing if the texture width/height match primary
SKIP_ALL_BUT_TINY_TEXTURE_RESOLVE_ON_TEXTURING - don't resolve textures before texturing unless they are tiny (2x2), another really hacky bit
SKIP_TEXTURE_RESOLVE_ON_MIDSIZE_TEXTURES - don't resolve textures with height from 64 to 512 and width from 64 to 1024, which treated as midsize
DISCARD_ON_BLIT_DESTNATION - don't resolve destination of blits, even if the blit is partial
RETURN_EVENT_QUERY_SUCCESS_IMMEDIATELY - don't stall waiting for event query results but return success immediately
RETURN_OCCLUSION_QUERY_SUCCESS_IMMEDIATELY - don't stall waiting for occlusion query results but return non-0 value immediately
DISCARD_SRC_ON_AA_RESOLVE - discard SRC sync on AA resolve
SKIP_INFREQUENT_TEXTURE_RESOLVES - If a texture is written frequently but resolved infrequently, discard the resolve
CLEAR_DISCARDED_TEXTURES - If we elect to skip the resolve of an RT-texture, clear it instead
DISCARD_ON_HUGE_ZB_FOR_TEXTURING - Discard texturing sync on HUGE ZB (bigger than 4kx4k)
APPBUG_FORCE_FLIPCHAIN_SYNC - Sync flipchain, if app does not draw or clear every frame
DISCARD_ON_RESOURCES_WITH_SUBRESOURCES - Discard GFX resolve on RTTs with subresources (cube/mip mapped) after nAFR GPU attempt to bind it as texture
SKIP_TEXTURE_RESOLVE_ON_COMPUTE_TEXTURING - Don't resolve textures before compute texturing
LASTMINUTE_FIXES - use this bit for the critical last minute's fixes. Was used in nvr65 drivers (DONT_ASSUME_SRT_ON_TEXTURE_MEANS_CLEAN)
OVERRIDE_BIT - makes the global profile override app's profile

CustomSetting.Description: ***DEPRECATED*** - IMPLICIT SLI NOT SUPPORTED ANY LONGER. multichip implicit SLI app compat value for DX12 apps

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: AUTOSELECT - the default value when no sli mode is set
FORCE_2AFR - force 2-AFR rendering mode for this app
FORCE_4AFR - force N-way AFR on N-way system
FORCE_3AFR - force 2-AFR on 2-way system and 3-AFR on N-way
SLI_MODE_MASK - --- not a value. This is a mask to select sli mode enum field
DISCARD_RT_ON_RENDERING - discard content of RTs before rendering
DISCARD_DS_ON_RENDERING - discard content of depth/stencil before rendering
DISABLE_DESCRIPTOR_PARSING - Disable parsing of descriptor tables to discover resource usage
DISCARD_ON_BLIT_DST - Discard if first access in a frame was Dst blit
DISCARD_ON_UAV - Discard if first access in a frame was UAV
DISCARD_IN_WRITE_STATE_ON_PRESENT - Discard resources, which cross frame in write barrier state
FORCE_PUSH_OF_ALL_WRITTEN_RESOURCES - Force all writen resource to be pshed to the next gpu on present
EARLY_PUSH_1x1xR32 - Temp hack - force early push f 1x1 R32 textues (HDR)
LASTMINUTE_FIXES - use this bit for the critical last minute's fixes.
OVERRIDE_BIT - makes the global profile override app's profile

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "SLI Compatibility Bits DX9". This setting affects multi-GPU rendering, workload distribution, or NVLINK/SLI behavior.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: ENABLE_SLI_AUTOSELECT - the default value when no sli mode is set
FORCE_2_AFR - Same as FORCE_2AFR, force 2-AFR rendering mode for this app
FORCE_SFR - force SFR rendering mode for this app
FORCE_AFR_OF_SFR__FALLBACK_2AFR - force 2-AFR on 2-way and 3-way, AFR_OF_SFR on 4-way
FORCE_4_AFR - force N-way AFR on N-way system
FORCE_3_AFR - force 2-AFR on 2-way system and 3-AFR on N-way
SLI_MODE_MASK - --- not a value. This is a mask to select sli mode enum field
STATIC_OR_WRITEONLY_VB_IN_HOST - when no broadcast HW is available, we might put VBs in host to avoid syncing
LOCKABLE_TEXTURES_IN_HOST - when no broadcast HW is available, we want to put lockable textures in host to avoid syncing
RELEASE_GPU_FOR_CUDA - if cuda is active, release the last gpu for cuda, Tesla only
IGNORE_TINY_LOCKS - ignore surface locks for <= 2x2 surfaces or 2x2 lock rectangles
AFR_DISCARD_TEXTURING_SYNC - Hacky bit, use only when absolutely non-avoidable: Do not AFR-sync texture before texturing. (65/70 drivers: it was DONT_SYNC_ON_TEXTURE_PUSH)
APPBUG_FORCE_FLIPCHAIN_SYNC - sync flipchain, if app does not clear every frame. Was used in nvr70 as ENABLE_VTEX_IN_AFR.
LASTMINUTE_FIXES - use this bit for the critical last minute's fixes. Was used in nvr65 drivers (DONT_ASSUME_SRT_ON_TEXTURE_MEANS_CLEAN)
DISABLE_TEXTURE_PUSH - disable texture push for syncing in AFR's mode
LIMIT_EARLY_PUSH_UP_TO_MIDSIZE_SURFACES - Limit early push strategy up to midsize 0x100 x 0x100 sufaces
DISCARD_TEXTURING_SYNC_ON_ZB - Skip sync on texturing for Z-buffers
AFR_DISCARD_SYNC_TEXTURE_LARGER_THAN_PRIMARY - for disabling textures that are larger than primary
DISCARD_CONTENT_OF_CUBE_MIP_TEXTURES - Discard content of cube maped or mip mapped textures
AFR_DISCARD_ALL_BUT_TINY_TEXTURING_SYNC - Even hackier bit: skip all texture sycns but very small ones (2x2)
DISCARD_RT_CONTENTS_ON_SRT - Assume a surface will be fully rendered on full target sets and
ASSUME_NOINTERFRAME_BLITS - Assume blits don't need to migrate, even if semantics suggest we do.
LIMIT_EARLY_PUSH_TO_TINY_SURFACES_ONLY - Allow early push strategy for tiny 2x2 and smaller surfaces only
DISCARD_RT_CONTENTS_ON_PARTIAL_SRT - Assume even a partial SRT can safely discard contents
AFR2_FLAGS - 'fast' SLI mode for UI in app profiles (DISCARD_RT_CONTENTS_ON_PARTIAL_SRT|DISCARD_RT_CONTENTS_ON_SRT
DISCARD_RT_CONTENTS_ON_PARTIAL_SRT2 - Assume partial SRT can be safely discarded, unless it uses more than one viewport

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "SLI Compatibility Bits OpenGL". This setting affects multi-GPU rendering, workload distribution, or NVLINK/SLI behavior.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: SYNC_VID2VID - Vid2Vid copies (CopyTexImage) update remote gpus
TRACK_DIRTY_VIEWPORT - Fallback if usage of glViewport leaves undefined backbuffer content
TRACK_DIRTY_DEPTHSTENCIL - Fallback if depth/stencilbuffer is not cleared after toggling gpu
SYNC_SLAVE_FOR_MASTER_TRANSITION - Sync master image to slave on AFR_MASTER to AFR transition
SYNC_VID2VID_DELAY_ONE_FRAME - Defer P2P texture updates until a texture is used more than one frame later

DISABLE_AFR_FOR_RT_SIZE_MASK - Disable render target width and height smaller or equal to this value. For example, if value is 8 then a render target with both width and height below or equal 8, disable AFR for that target
AFR_EARLY_PUSH_RT_SIZE_MASK - Early push small AFR render targets. If the render target width and height both smaller or equal to this value, do early push

CustomSetting.Description: Copy Engine Configuration for DX1x

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Off - Disable the copy engine blitter
On - Enable the copy engine blitter
FORCE_CE_BLIT - Force using CE blitter even if CE perfstrategy says otherwise
FORCE_BASIC_MODEL - Force to run copy engine in basic model (default is basic prime)
IGNORE_MIN_CE_TRANSFER_SIZE - Ignore d3dreg key MIN_CE_TRANSFER_SIZE and allow all transfer sizes by CE
FORCE_CE_UPLOADS - Copy Engine Async Uploads for all uploads (ignoring location of destination surface)
ENABLE_LZO_COMPRESSION - Enable LZO compression for the uploads
FORCE_LZO_COMPRESSION - Force LZO compression for all uploads (even if we have to stall)
ENABLE_CE0_USAGE - UMD will use CE0 when both CE0/CE1 are available. Required for testing HW scheduling

CustomSetting.Description: multichip app specific hacks for single app

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: NONE - the default value, no app specific hacks
EARLY_PUSH_ALL_SUBRESOURCES - Defer early push of subresources
DISCARD_ON_TEXTURING_AFTER_BLIT_FOR_SCREENSIZE_RTT - Discard sync on screensize RTT if texturing happen after blit into
DISCARD_ON_COMPUTE_1D - Discard content of compute (like DISCARD_ON_COMPUTE bit) only for 1-dimensional resources
FC_GPULT_BG - Force load balancing to GPU_LIMITED if bridgeless is in action, AvP
DISCARD_ON_RESOURCES_WITH_SUBRESOURCES_GPU_COUNT - Discard GFX resolve on RTTs with subresources (cube/mip mapped) after nAFR GPU attempt to bind it as texture
ACIV_LOCK_WAR - Assassins Creed: BF MP WAR. Requires 0x8 be set. Granted read lock on staging RTT ABGR8 0x60/0x60 or 0x200/0x200

ALLOW_P2P_FOR_COMPRESSED_TEXTURES - Application could use GPU for compress textures, it happens in unicast and final compressed texture becomes dirty on non-active GPUs. as result we need to sync such textures, but use P2H2P instead of more fast P2P. This bit allowed P2P for such cases.

RESPECT_SYNCS_FROSTBITE_SPECIFIC - SW:BF and possible other Frostbite 3+ based games requires specific syncs to handle temporal AAs/AO and cubemap updates properly, this bit is about these syncs, also respect sync for decal VBs
DO_SYNC_ON_BIND_FOR_SQUARE_TYPELESS_R8_R32_BGRA8_RTT - Respects sync on bind for square RTTs with B8G8R8A8, R8 and R32 TYPELESS format, hack for broken texture streaming in Elite Dangerous

DO_NOT_REPORT_SLI_FOR_MOSAIC_UNTIL_IN_AFR - Do not report SLI to the app until in AFR. Trust the App that it will query SLI state again on switching to fullscreen and won't disable it's SLI features based on the initial values returned. Hack for hung Elite Dangerous

DO_SYNC_ON_BIND_FOR_SQUARE_ABGR16F_0x100__RTT - Respect sync on bind for 0x100/0x100 ABGR16F RTT. The app has bind/unbind it rarely and discard on bind in AFR2 key kept it discarded wrongly. Hack for Mad Max
ALLOW_BF1_SYNCS - Allow sync of a few specific resources in BF1 Frostbite engine to fix some flickering
DO_SYNC_ON_BIND_FOR_3D_RTT - Do sync on bind for 3D textures (depth >1), this WAR needed for fog of war corruption fix in XCOM2
DO_SYNC_ON_BIND_FOR_SQUARE_RGBA_ABGR_0x100_0x200_RTT - Do sync on bind for square RTTs with A8B8G8R8, R8G8B8A8 formats, and 0x100/0x200 width, WAR to fix corruption with Dark Souls 3
DISCARD_ON_R11G11B10_FLOAT_RT - Discard content of R11G11B10_FLOAT RT, DiRT 4 specific hack
ALLOW_RFTA_SYNCS - Allow sync of a few specific resources in Remnant From The Ashes to avoid corruption
DISCARD_ON_NVAPI_SYNC_FOR_SCREENSIZE_RTT - Discard primary size resolves from beginEndResourceRendering, Starlink specific hack
RESPECT_PRIMARY_DISCARD_ON_PRESENT - Discard primary surface if and only if it has DISCARD_ON_PRESENT flag (for 3DMark)
DISABLE_COPY_TRACKER_SWAPPING - Disable swapping of redirected resources in CopyTracker in AFR
DO_SYNC_ON_SCREENSIZE_R11G11B10_FLOAT - Sync screen size resources of type R11G11B10_FLOAT
DISCARD_ON_NVAPI_SYNC_FOR_SQUARE_RTT_0x400 - Discard 0x400 x 0x400 size resolves from beginEndResourceRendering
ALLOW_JWE_SYNCS - Allow sync of a few specific resources in Jurassic World Evolution to fix some flickering

CustomSetting.Description: multichip app specific hacks for single app in DX9

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: NONE - the default value, no app specific hacks

CustomSetting.Description: Control strategies used to improve Mosaic and Surround performance

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLE_TWOD - Disable TwoD engine local transfers optimization
ENABLE_WINDOWED_AFR - Enable AFR support for windowed applications
DISABLE_CE_TRANSFER_2WAY - Disable CE transfer on 2 way systems
DISABLE_CE_TRANSFER_3WAY - Disable CE transfer on 3 way systems
DISABLE_CE_TRANSFER_4WAY - Disable CE transfer on 4 way systems
UNICAST_CE_TRANSFER_2WAY - Use unicast CE transfer on 2 way systems
UNICAST_CE_TRANSFER_3WAY - Use unicast CE transfer on 3 way systems
UNICAST_CE_TRANSFER_4WAY - Use unicast CE transfer on 4 way systems
SYNC_PRESENT_CHANNELS - Synchronize present channels before present
DISABLE_VIDEO_BRIDGE - Prevents Video Bridge use in GP10x
DISABLE_FLIPEX_BC_TRANSITION - Allow FlipEx applications to run in AFR even when in composition mode
FORCE_BAR1_WAR - Always request aliasing for DX9 primaries

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Stereo Setting 0x701EB457". This setting affects stereo rendering behavior or stereo-specific compatibility logic.
Flags related to VR Support

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: 0 - Default value. Used for all non-VR (Desktop-only) apps.
1 - For VR-only apps. This will blacklist the app for Stereo (3D Vision). NOTE: This bit is MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with DESKTOP_VR_DUAL_MODE_APP and VR_RUNTIME_COMPONENT and STEREO_VR_APP.
2 - For apps that have both - VR and Desktop Mode. NOTE: This bit is MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with VR_ONLY_APP and VR_RUNTIME_COMPONENT.
4 - For executables that are part of a VR Runtime. NOTE: This bit is MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with DESKTOP_ONLY_APP and DESKTOP_VR_DUAL_MODE_APP and STEREO_VR_APP.
8 - For executables those do not want to block NV Stereo while running in VR enviornment. NOTE: This bit is MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with VR_RUNTIME_COMPONENT and VR_ONLY_APP.

LCD - Use a 3D Vision capable LCD
DLP - Use a 3D Vision capable DLP TV

Display mode to use when stereo is enabled

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: SHUTTER_GLASSES - Active stereo mode frame interleaved shutter glasses via DDC adapter shutter glasses (ELSA Revelator)
VERTICAL_INTERLACED - Passive stereo mode vertical interlaced
TWINVIEW - Passive stereo mode clone mode
NV17_SHUTTER_GLASSES_DAC0 - Active stereo mode frame interleaved shutter glasses via 3-pin mini-DIN DAC0
NV17_SHUTTER_GLASSES_DAC1 - Active stereo mode frame interleaved shutter glasses via 3-pin mini-DIN DAC1
COLOR_LINE - Active stereo mode frame interleaved shutter glasses via blue line adapter (StereoGraphics)
COLOR_INTERLEAVED - Passive stereo mode color interleaved (Sharp 3D)
ANAGLYPH - Passive stereo mode colored anaglyph (left:red right:cyan(blue+green))
HORIZONTAL_INTERLACED - Passive stereo mode horizontal interlaced (Arisawa/Hyundai/Zalman/Pavione/Miracube)
SIDE_FIELD - Passive stereo mode vertical subfield (Pavione/Miracube)
SUB_FIELD - Passive stereo mode horizontal subfield (Pavione/Miracube)
CHECKERBOARD - Passive stereo mode checkerboard pattern (3D DLP)
INVERSE_CHECKERBOARD - Passive stereo mode inverse checkerboard pattern (3D DLP)
TRIDELITY_SL - Passive stereo mode line-wise biased vertical interlaced (Tridelity SL/SV -> SingleView)
TRIDELITY_MV - Passive stereo mode slanted line-wise biased vertical interlaced 5 view (Tridelity MV -> MultiView)
SEEFRONT - Passive stereo mode using Seefront pattern (SeeFront)
STEREO_MIRROR - Passive stereo mode clone mode with right eye mirrored (Planar)
FRAME_SEQUENTIAL - Active stereo mode frame interleaved (NVIDIA 3D Vision)
AUTODETECT_PASSIVE_MODE - Passive stereo mode autodetected by monitor capabilities
AEGIS_DT_FRAME_SEQUENTIAL - Active stereo mode frame interleaved (NVIDIA AegisDT embedded emitter)
OEM_EMITTER_FRAME_SEQUENTIAL - Active stereo mode frame interleaved (GPIO connected OEM emitter)
DP_INBAND - Active stereo mode frame interleaved via DisplayPort inband MSA signal
USE_HW_DEFAULT - Select hardware default based on capabilities

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: HAZARD_CHECK_ALL_TRANSITIONS - All resource transitions trigger a hazard check
HAZARD_CHECK_ALL_BARRIERS - All barrier types trigger a hazard check
VALIDATE_SCRATCH_AND_RTAS_MEM - Check for missed scratch and RTAS hazards before every build and issue additional barriers as needed
FLUSH_ON_COPY - Flush bvh builds on every copyRTAS call
FLUSH_ON_EMIT - Flush bvh builds on every emitRTAS call
FLUSH_ON_DISPATCHRAYS - Flush bvh builds on every dispatchRays call
IGNORE_VA_RANGES - Flush bvh builds whenever a barrier is issued
FORCE_SINGLE_BATCH - Forces a flush immediately after batching. Effectively forces batch size of 1

MINIMIZE_MEMORY - Minimize memory usage, possibly at the cost of build and/or trace performance

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Setting 0x0043C7A2". Data type: DWORD.

Low latency mode settings. Disabled by default (to enable set VSYNCMODE=VIRTUAL). When enabled this provides a mode which is similar to 'vsync ON' - i.e, no tearing, but has fps/latency similar to 'vsync OFF'. The idea is to let the app render as fast it can and present the latest frame at vblank. The BLEND mode enables temporal supersampling using a exponential decay filter by making use of the additional rendered frames to smoothen out the animation.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: ALLOW - Allows LOW Latency VSync (Fast Sync). Set this bit to 0 for denylisting the app.
BLEND - Enable Blending. Might result in slightly higher latency but smoother animation. Use LOW_LATENCY_BLEND_FACTOR to control blending factor.
DYNAMIC_FPS_CAP - Enable Dynamic fps limit to cap to a multiple of refresh rate.
COLLAPSE_FLIP - Enable Display hardware's collapseFlip mechanism to pick the latest rendered frame.

CustomSetting.Description: Override the default scheduler

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: BLOCKSYNC - Megakernel scheduling with intra CTA synchonized.

CustomSetting.Description: Extra flags passed to DXR shader compiles and pipeline creation

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: AABBS_ONLY - Cull triangles and optimize the pipeline for custom primitives.
TRIANGLES_ONLY - Cull custom primitives and optimize the pipeline for triangles.
DISABLED - Don't propagate flags from application.

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Setting 0x00481376". Data type: DWORD.
Defer barriers until needed.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DEFER_ALL - Defer barriers until needed by next draw/dispatch/copy
DEFER_ALL_UNTIL_PCAS - DEFER ALL but also defer compute until PCAS. Experimental.
DEFER_ALL_CROSS_CL_DEFERRAL - DEFER ALL plus cross CL deferral. Defer resolving end of CL barriers until ECL time
DEFER_ALL_PRE_CROSS_CL_DEFERRAL - DEFER ALL with cross cl deferral enabled, plus defer CL barriers until ECL time. Experimental.
DEFER_ALL_NO_GRAPHICS_OPTIMIZATIONS - DEFER_ALL but with graphics optimizations turned off. For experiments.
DEFER_ALL_DISCARD_IN_DISPATCH_TABLE - DEFER ALL but always resolve pending syncs through dispatch table, regardless if discard is NOP or not. For experiments.
DO_ONLY_SYNC_NO_DEFERRAL - Do all the synchronization and invalidation immediately at the end of the barrier DDI, and don't defer them. For debugging.
NO_WFI_REMOVAL - Don't use reference value to remove any barriers, but always issue the synchronization
KEEP_REDUNDANT_BARRIERS - Don't remove redundant (readonly->readonly subset) barriers

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Setting 0x004A5CE5". Data type: DWORD.
Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Setting 0x00503F9A". Data type: DWORD.
Mode for inlining other shaders into raygen shader when trace depth <= 1

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: AUTO - Auto inline with rtcore heuristic
ALWAYS - Always inline when the trace depth <= 1

CustomSetting.Description: Defines whether to allow AutoVRS Perfstrat only for VR games or not

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Experimental - Regkey disables cache invalidates on subchannel switches on GA10x+
CustomSetting.Description: Regkey disables cache invalidates on subchannel switches on GA10x+. Specify, which particular switches are affected. Also, specify if any caches need to be excluded from override

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: NO_OVERRIDE - No overrides, any subchannel switch causes all cache invalidates
FE0_CE_TO_COMPUTE - Ignore invalidates on the FE0 pipe for subchannel switches from CE to COMPUTE
FE0_3D_TO_COMPUTE - Ignore invalidates on the FE0 pipe for subchannel switches from 3D to COMPUTE
FE0_CE_TO_3D - Ignore invalidates on the FE0 pipe for subchannel switches from CE to 3D
FE0_COMPUTE_TO_3D - Ignore invalidates on the FE0 pipe for subchannel switches from COMPUTE TO 3D
FE1_CE_TO_COMPUTE - Ignore invalidates on the FE1 pipe for subchannel switches from CE to COMPUTE
SUBCHSW_TYPE_MASK - Mask of subchannel switch types
EXCLUDE_INV_SHADER_CACHES_INSTR - Set the bit to invalidate instruction caches (ie exclude from override)
EXCLUDE_INV_SHADER_CACHES_DATA - Set the bit to invalidate shader data caches (ie exclude from override)
EXCLUDE_INV_SHADER_CACHES_CONST - Set the bit to invalidate shader constant caches (ie exclude from override)
EXCLUDE_INV_SHADER_CACHES_LOCKS - Set the bit to invalidate shader locks caches (ie exclude from override)
EXCLUDE_INV_SAMPLER_CACHE - Set the bit to invalidate sampler cache (ie exclude from override)
EXCLUDE_INV_TEXTURE_HEADER_CACHE - Set the bit to invalidate texture header cache (ie exclude from override)
EXCLUDE_INV_MASK - Mask of invalidate bits that are assumed by default
INCLUDE_INV_RESTER_CACHE - EXPERIMENTAL (note reversed meaning): set the bit to disable invalidate of raster cache
INCLUDE_INV_ROP_MINI_CACHE - EXPERIMENTAL (note reversed meaning): set the bit to disable invalidate of ROP mini cache

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLE_CORE_DISPATCH_FOR_DX11 - Disable core dispatch QMD allocations on pre-DX12 devices
DISABLE_CORE_DISPATCH_FOR_DX11_AUTO_SCG - Disable core dispatch QMD allocations on pre-DX12 devices with Auto SCG
DISABLE_CORE_DISPATCH_FOR_DX11_AUTO_SCG_SLI - Disable core dispatch QMD allocations on pre-DX12 devices with Auto SCG and SLI
DEBUG_TRACK_COUNTER_VALUES - Use NOP methods to track counter values
DEBUG_TRACK_CORE_DISPATCH_QMDS - Use the second QMD semaphore to track completion of core QMDs
DEBUG_TRACK_DISPATCH_HELPER_QMDS - Use the second QMD semaphore to track completion of dispatch helper QMDs

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: BIND_ON_ALLOCATE - Bind block (make allocation resident) on allocate.
WAITONCPU_FOR_PAGING_AFTER_ALLOCATE - Wait on CPU for paging fenceValue returned at MakeResident. Ignored when BIND_ON_ALLOCATE is not set.
WAITONCPU_FOR_PAGING_BEFORE_PRESENT - Wait on CPU before present for max paging fenceValue to reach.
DISABLE_NOTWRITTEN_OPTIMIZATIN - DXGK optimizes eviction based on NotWrittenTo flag in evictCB. Force NotWrittenTo=0 to disable DXGK optimization.
DISABLE_EVICT_ONLY_IF_NECESSARY - Sets EvictOnlyIfNecessary of EvictCB to false, which means we are telling OS to evict the allocation asap.

Controls the way to decide whether app is running in foreground

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: FOREGROUND_POLICY_PRESENT_WND - If present window is a foreground window then assume this app is in foreground
FOREGROUND_POLICY_FORCE - Assume app is in foreground unconditionally
FOREGROUND_POLICY_FOREGROUND_WND - Assume app is in foreground if it owns the foreground window.

CustomSetting.Description: Bytes of memory to allocate for DXR DispatchRays when using some experimental schedulers
additional settings for the sample interleave feature

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: SAMPLES_FROM_FILE - Do not use our default patterns but get the sample positions from a file specified in MAXWELL_B_FRAME_SAMPLE_POSITION_INTERLEAVE_PATH
DISABLE_ON_SQUARE_TARGETS - Disable the effect on square rendertargets, the rationale being they might be used to encode shadow maps
DISABLE_DITHERING - Some games are incompatible with a sample pattern that varies per pixel position. So disable this for this game

DECOMPRESS_DEPTH_ON_TEXTURE_READ - L2 from texture is unable to interpret non standard sample positions for depth, so we need to decompress them on the fly before that texture read happens. No need to enable if corruption is not visible.

ALLOW_ONLY_ON_ALLOWLISTED_RATIOS - Enable the effect only on surfaces that are of the same aspect ratio as the backbuffer. This can be used to avoid applying interleaving on shadowmaps for games where DISABLE_ON_DENY_LISTED_RATIOS doesn't work.

ALLOW_ON_BIGGER_THAN_BACK_BUFFER - when ALLOW_ONLY_ON_ALLOWLISTED_RATIOS is set, by default interleaving is disabled on surfaces bigger than the backbuffer. Set this key to enable it for such surfaces that have same aspect ratio as backbuffer but are bigger. This setting has no effect if ALLOW_ONLY_ON_WHITELISTED_RATIOS isn't set.
IGNORE_APP_PROFILE - if MAXWELL_B_SAMPLE_INTERLEAVE is ON and there is no app profile associated with the current executable, apply the effect nonetheless, used for testing purpose

PATCH_ATTRIBUTE_EVAL_OFFSETS - Always evaluating the attributes at pixel center causes corruptions with some games when run with MFAA and without MSAA. Setting this bit causes the driver to replace all IPA instructions with IPA.offset when the shader is used without MSAA which ensures the attribute evaluation happens at the same location as the jittered raster sample position.

CustomSetting.Description: This regkey disables compression for buffer resources. This includes DX12 heaps. Make sure to include this key when disabling all types of compression

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: ENABLED - Allow the driver to enable compression when possible
FORCE_ON - Force enabling compression on all buffers (might cause issues)

CustomSetting.Description: This regkey specifies enabled functionality used by convert-to-LDG

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: UNUSED - Formerly OCG_RANGE, which is now permanently the way of things
OCG_RANGE_HEADER - Use the OCG OOR check in getVAandSizeFromResource - this will enable constExpr for the header loads
ULDC_LOAD - Allow conversion from LDG to ULDC for data loads
ULDC_LOAD_HEADER11 - Allow conversion from LDG to ULDC for header loads. DX11 only
ULDC_LOAD_HEADER12 - Allow conversion from LDG to ULDC for header loads. DX12 only
ULDC_LOAD_HEADER - Allow conversion from LDG to ULDC for header loads.
REDUCED_TEXHEADER11 - Use a simplified (VA and Size) header for anything that will *only* be done with CtLDG, DX11 only
REDUCED_TEXHEADER12 - Same thing as above, but for DX12
ULDC_LOAD_DISABLE_CONST_INVALIDATION11 - Disable const cache invalidations for ULDC loads of data per PSO change. For DX11 only
ULDC_LOAD_DISABLE_CONST_INVALIDATION12 - Disable const cache invalidations for ULDC loads of data per PSO change. For DX12 only
ULDC_LOAD_DISABLE_CONST_INVALIDATION - Disable const cache invalidations for ULDC loads of data per PSO change.
ULDC_LOAD_HEADER_DISABLE_CONST_INVALIDATION11 - Disable const cache invalidations for header ULDC loads per PSO change. For DX11 only
ULDC_LOAD_HEADER_DISABLE_CONST_INVALIDATION12 - Disable const cache invalidations for header ULDC loads per PSO change. For DX12 only
ULDC_LOAD_HEADER_DISABLE_CONST_INVALIDATION - Disable const cache invalidations for header ULDC loads per PSO change.

CustomSetting.Description: This regkey specifies LDC-to-LDG translation options (DXIL-only)

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLED - No translation of LDC to LDG
DIVERGENT_ONLY - Only translate divergent, dynamically-indexed LDCs

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Setting 0x00CC0F79". Data type: DWORD.
Enable D3DDDI_CREATEHWQUEUEFLAGS NoBroadcastWait for single-node driver SCG channel

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Experimental - LMEM Per-SM Warp Throttling Limit
CustomSetting.Description: If this is set to a value other than zero, the LMEM bytes per SM warp throttling limit will be overridden. Allocation granularity is 128Kb and will be rounded up/enforced by the driver.
Decides whether to use the MME program (default) or CPU to resolve tex-sampler pairs

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLE_MME_RESOLVE_D3D11 - Fallback to CPU resolution of tex-sampler pairs for D3D11
DISABLE_MME_RESOLVE_D3D12 - Fallback to CPU resolution of tex-sampler pairs for D3D11
DISABLE_MME_RESOLVE_D3D11_ON_KEPLER - Fallback to CPU resolution of tex-sampler pairs for D3D11
DISABLE_MME_RESOLVE_D3D12_ON_KEPLER - Fallback to CPU resolution of tex-sampler pairs for D3D11

CustomSetting.Description: ignore DX12 API visibility mask and force full visibility

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Experimental - DX9 Host Staging Buffer Size
CustomSetting.Description: This key is using for forcing size of host staging buffer on DX9

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Experimental - WDDM v2 SLI Control Bits
CustomSetting.Description: Bits to control WDDMv2 aspects of SLI

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLE_IFLIP - Disallow IFLIP SLI on WDDMv2 (DX1x driver)
DISABLE_RRI_FOR_IFLIP - Do not apply AFR specific RRI for IFlip
DISABLE_DEFDESTROY_FOR_IFLIP - Disable defer destroy for shared primaries when SLI is enabled (as a WAR for MSAction Bug 200335862)
DISABLE_IFLIP_DX9 - Disallow IFLIP SLI on WDDMv2 (DX9 driver)
DISABLE_EXPLICIT_DX12_WAR - Disables the WAR that creates companion allocations on primary creation
FORCE_SYNC_CD_FOR_IFLIP - Force synchronous create/destroy for eFSE shared primaries
BREAK_ON_FRONT_BUFFER_RENDER - Debug bits: break if front buffer render detected

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Setting 0x00DDA345". Data type: DWORD.
Controls when the desc heap contents are read for some bind points

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLED - Default D3D12 behavior - desc heap contents only guaranteed at execute
ENABLED - The app promises that the desc heap contents will be immutable from record to execute

CustomSetting.Description: Allows batching of fences when a run of UpdateTileMappings is called in sequence with no other CQ commands.

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Experimental - SM Trap Handler and Dispatcher
CustomSetting.Description: enable/disable SM's trap handler and dispatcher code
how much to multiply the volatility factor by with each new update
Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Setting 0x00E52AC0". Data type: DWORD.
Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Setting 0x00E86028". Data type: DWORD.
Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Setting 0x00E942FE". Data type: DWORD.
Flags that are used by PSO Library codepath

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLE_SERIALIZED_CHECKS - Disables all checks of the serialized data to confirm it is from the current driver

CustomSetting.Description: enable/disable Dirty Tile Map opts
Flags used to control TileMapKernel/consumer shader behavior and code-generation. Please note SUQUERY_PER_THREAD_SUM and TILE_PER_THREAD_SUM are mutually exclusive.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: CONSUMER_OPTIMIZE_FOR_TLD4 - Codegen optimized for TLD4 vectorization
CONSUMER_COMPARE_HEADER_POOL_INDICES - Compare header pool indices instead of all header dwords
USE_CODEGEN_HINTS - Use slot-specific codegen hints. Tilemap kernel verifies if these hold true dynamically. Consumer codegen is specialized for these settings.
TMKERNEL_ENABLE_TILE_PER_THREAD_SUM - Enable summarization on a tile per thread basis
TMKERNEL_ENABLE_PRE_SUM_KERNEL - Run pre summarization in a dedicated pass which forces tileMapKernel as a dispatch Indirect path
ENABLE_VA_RANGE_TRACKING - Enable VA Range Tracking in TMKERNEL and consumer shader
PREFER_PLC_FOR_ALL_PAGES - Ask KMD to disable PLC WAR by opting into PLC for all pages
CONSUMER_MEMOIZE_INITS - Enable memoization of initialization results in pixel shader consumers (CS'es get constExpr)
DISABLE_CONSUMER_CODEGEN - Debug knob to disable consumer shader transforms.
OPTIMIZE_FOR_ALLCLEAN_TILES - Tilemap kernel and consumer changes to optimize for fully clean SRVs. Each lookup has 3 paths: allClean, clean after STM lookup, or dirty.
CONSUMER_ALLCLEAN_OR_DIRTY - Codegen option to make each lookup have only 2 paths: allClean or dirty (effective only when OPTIMIZE_FOR_ALLCLEAN_TILES is set).
TMKERNEL_ENABLE_SHMEMOPT_FOR_LINEAR_FILTER - Apply shared mem opt while constructing tilemap of a linear filtered texture
CONSUMER_CODE_SPECIALIZE_FOR_ZEROS - Enable code specialization if clean value is zero and used in a multiply or similar op
CONSUMER_CHECK_TILEMAP_READINESS - Check tilemap readiness with an explicit global load in the consumer. If not set, readiness guaranteed implicitly through QMD semaphore synchronization.
TMKERNEL_ENABLE_SUQUERY_PER_THREAD_SUM - enable suquery parallelization summarization aka each query tile is issued per thread instead of tile(which may consist several query tiles) per thread
TMKERNEL_LOOP_OVER_TEXSLOTS - loop over texslots with fewer CTAs per grid (for all chosen kernels)

CustomSetting.Description: Enabled Modes for sample interleave (MFAA)

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: 16x_custom - Enable 16x custom pattern mode (which is same as standard pattern) - so setting this has no effect.

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Setting 0x00F56ABE". Data type: DWORD.
Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Setting 0x00F56BBE". Data type: DWORD.
Controls functionality for dumping of various tracked semaphores

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: ENABLE_SCG_GPU_STATE_HAZARD_ANNOTATION - Dumps SCG GPU hazard information
ENABLE_ENTRY_POINT_ANNOTATION - Dumps all enter/exit entry points (extremely verbose)
ENABLE_CUSTOM_ANNOTATION - Dumps a variety of hard-coded entrypoints
ENABLE_PUSHER_ANNOTATION - Dumps pusher information, including flush/present
ENABLE_DEBUG_ANNOTATION - Use this for testing or debugging, do not check in any code that uses this bit
ENABLE_HOTKEY - Waits for hotkey to start profiling and dump (ctrl+F7)
ENABLE_EXTERNAL_PROCESS_NOTIFICATION - Signals event on profiling start, and waits for event to complete. Use with ENABLE_HOTKEY.
ENABLE_PERF_INSPECTOR_FILENAME - Uses a PerfInspector-compatible filename format
ENABLE_EXIT_ON_COMPLETION - After TRACKED_SEMAPHORE_FRAMES or when PerfInspector signals to stop, terminate the process

ENABLE_PIPELINED_COPY - Enable Pipelined Copy for Sync CE aka Pipelined + Flush_Enable = False

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Driver - Ansel Depth Buffer Detection Tuning
CustomSetting.Description: Toggle various settings useful for tuning how to identify Depth buffers in Ansel. More info: https://confluence.nvidia.com/display/NGX/Depth+Buffer+Detection+Design.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: NONE - None of the depth settings will be enabled.
USE_STATS - Use the Stats Mechanism to identify which buffer has Depth information.
USE_VIEWPORT - Use Viewport ratio to compare with backbuffer ratio as a metric for determining whether a buffer has Depth.
VIEWPORT_SCALING - Use Viewport information to scale Depth image which is needed for games with Dynamic Resolution Scaling. Can only be used when USE_VIEWPORT is enabled.
OVERRIDE_EN - Enable Depth Settings overrides for Y/Z Inversion.
INVERT_Y - Indicate whether a game's depth is inverted in Y-plane, if OVERRIDE_EN is set. Inverted means Bottom=1.0, Top = 0.0
INVERT_Z - Indicate whether a game's depth is inverted in Z-plane, if OVERRIDE_EN is set. Inverted means Near=1.0, Far = 0.0
ALL - All of the depth settings will be enabled.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: App - Enable AsyncDevice except in configs that do not work (some SLI, Optimus) or if the application requested to disable them

On - Enable AsyncDevice ignoring safety or application requests

REPLAY_SAMPLES_MASK - number of times to replay the geometry
SELECTOR_SLIAA_MASK - support for SLIAA this bit should tell us if we have selected SLIAA from CPL.

CustomSetting.Description: Transparency multisampling anti-aliasing modes.
