Full Color + Alpha (3x shaders, texcoords only)
Full Color + Alpha (4x shaders, full adjustment)
Full Color + Alpha (3x shaders, full adjustment)

CustomSetting.Description: NV private interface to adjust the behavior of the post processing engine

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: OFF - No specific adjustments for the post processing engine are selected
EXECUTE_ON_DWM - If bit is set, post processing engine operations are executed on desktop compositor owned fullscreen buffers.
EXECUTE_ON_NON_DWM - If bit is set, post processing engine operations are executed fullscreen buffers no owned by the desktop compositor.
USE_SCRATCH_MEMORY_AS_GPU_PROGRAM_STORAGE - If bit is set, a global os hidden scratch framebuffer portion is used as gpu storage instead of context allocations.
DRAW_ON_SCREEN_INDICATOR_DLDSR - If bit is set, an on screen indicator should be rendered for DLDSR on top of the executed post processing engine gpu program output.
USE_DEVICE_RENDER_CHANNEL - If bit is set, 'If bit is set, the UMDs are instructed to schedule kernel assisted ppe work on the standard 3d render channel (this might not be supported by all umds).
USE_UMD_SHADER_RESOURCE - If bit is set, use shader resource allocated by UMD for gpu program storage. This overrides the USE_SCRATCH_MEMORY_AS_GPU_PROGRAM_STORAGE bit.
DRAW_ON_SCREEN_INDICATOR_UPSCALE - If bit is set, draw an on-screen indicator for Upscale.
MASK_FOR_EXECUTE_ON_DWM - EXECUTE_ON_DWM settings are just modified in case this mask bit is also set.
MASK_FOR_EXECUTE_ON_NON_DWM - EXECUTE_ON_NON_DWM settings are just modified in case this mask bit is also set.
MASK_FOR_USE_SCRATCH_MEMORY_AS_GPU_PROGRAM_STORAGE - USE_SCRATCH_MEMORY_AS_GPU_PROGRAM_STORAGE settings are just modified in case this mask bit is also set.
MASK_FOR_DRAW_ON_SCREEN_INDICATOR_DLDSR - DRAW_ON_SCREEN_INDICATOR_DLDSR settings are just modified in case this mask bit is also set.
MASK_FOR_USE_DEVICE_RENDER_CHANNEL - USE_DEVICE_RENDER_CHANNEL settings are just modified in case this mask bit is also set.
MASK_FOR_USE_UMD_SHADER_RESOURCE - USE_UMD_SHADER_RESOURCE settings are just modified in case this mask bit is also set.
MASK_FOR_DRAW_ON_SCREEN_INDICATOR_UPSCALE - DRAW_ON_SCREEN_INDICATOR_UPSCALE settings are just modified in case this mask bit is also set.
MASK_FOR_ALL_CONTROLLED_BITS - Combined mask bits for all potential mask bit controlled entries.

CustomSetting.Description: Enable AutoFL support.
Set the behavior for Alpha/Beta performance strategy (static or dynamic)

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Static - The driver always uses Alpha fraction set via PS_ALPHABETA_FRACTION
Dynamic_Shader - The driver adjusts a shader unique Alpha fraction via AlphaBeta clocks
Dynamic_VBIB - The driver adjusts a vb/ib ID unique Alpha fraction via AlphaBeta clocks

CustomSetting.Description: Fixed Alpha fraction to use when PS_ALPHABETA is in static mode

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Default - Fixed Alpha fraction to use when PS_ALPHABETA is in static mode

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "PS Async Shader Scheduler Flags". Data type: DWORD.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: IGNORE_LOAD_BALANCING - debug: Ignore gpu load, apply always
IGNORE_GARBAGE_COLLECT_THRESHOLD - debug: Ignore fill status and garbage collect every frame
COMPILE_IMMEDIATELY - debug: stall in the driver thread until the compile result arrives
LIMIT_SHADER_CREATION_TO_ONE_THREAD - Limit number of spawned threads to one (rather than the number of cores) for async creations
LIMIT_OPTIMIZED_SHADER_RECOMPILE_TO_ONE_THREAD - Limit number of spawned threads to one (rather than the number of cores) for optimized shader recompiles
DISABLE_MULTI_APP_THREAD_HEURISTIC - Disable heuristic for detecting multiple app threads compiling shaders
DISABLE_OPTIMIZED_SHADER_RECOMPILE - Recompile multiple optimized versions of shaders
DISABLE_SHADER_CREATION - Compile multiple shaders in parallel at creation
FORCE_NV_THREADS - Forces the perfstrat to use NvGenericThreadUtils as its thread pool.
DISABLE_BACKGROUND_PROCESSING_CAPS - Sets the caps bit for background processing support to false, D3D12DDICAPS_TYPE_D3D12_OPTIONS::BackgroundProcessingSupported.

CustomSetting.Description: WDDM1.0+ DX9/DX10
controls new-style GPU-based const folding (dx12 only)

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: PS Dx10 Surface Placement Highest Priority Dx1x
CustomSetting.Description: Normally, resources are capped at high priority. This regkey allows selective use of maximum priority, equivalent to D3DDDI_ALLOCATIONPRIORITY_MAXIMUM for these buffers.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: RTs/ZBs use maximum priority on mixed-bus GPUs (192-bit 2 GB, etc.)

CustomSetting.Description: Reduction tracker load balancing.
Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "PS Surface Placement Allow". Data type: DWORD.
Normally, render targets and Z buffers use high priority. This regkey allows selective use of maximum priority, equivalent to D3DDDI_ALLOCATIONPRIORITY_MAXIMUM for these buffers.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: RTs/ZBs use maximum priority on mixed-bus GPUs (192-bit 2 GB, etc.)

CustomSetting.Description: Controls promotion of dynamic buffers

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLE_DYNAMIC_PROMOTION - Don't promote VBs that are locked even if drawn from extensively
DISABLE_STATIC_PROMOTION - Don't promote VBs that are never even locked
DISABLE_RW_IB_PROMOTION - Don't attempt to promote IBs with read-write cpu access flags
DISABLE_W_IB_PROMOTION - Don't attempt to promote write-only IBs

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Read Only DSV Earlyz Hazard WAR Enable
CustomSetting.Description: Track read-only DSVs as last having been bound to PS to catch WAR hazards between early-z and PS.

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: On - Track read-only DSVs as last having been bound to PS to catch WAR hazards between early-z and PS

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the predefined driver behavior associated with "Rebar Expr Modes". Data type: DWORD.
Specifies max register allowed when compiling/optimizing a shader

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Max - Specifies max register allowed when compiling/optimizing a shader

CustomSetting.Description: Setting from which CPL will decide whether to show SILK Smoothness as normal or greyed out
Silk reduces stutters in games caused by variable CPU or GPU workloads
Enable parameter validation of different DX1x DDI functios

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Nothing - Do not validate any input
COPYREGION - Validate input on CopyRegion functions
INTERPRET_NEGATIVE - Validate input considering negative input even if the parameter type is unsigned

CustomSetting.Description: Toggle AIC Watermarking Indicator on or off

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: MASK - Mask of all valid bits

CustomSetting.Description: Controls the NVIDIA driver behavior associated with "Watermarking Traceability". Data type: DWORD.
Enables the Whisper Mode functionality, cap FPS for AC mode only
Override FPS for Whisper Mode, can be set differently for each application
NV private interface to enable/disable workstation features

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: SRS_1714_WIN8_STEREO - Enable wks stereo for native dx11 Win8 stereo
WIN8_STEREO_EXPORT_IF_ENABLED - Export wddm 1.2 stereo modes only if wks stereo is enabled
HDMI_STEREO - Enables HDMI stereo by overriding any suitable display mode to stereo
HDMI_EXCLUSIVE_STEREO - Enables stereo just on HDMI displays (requires HDMI_STEREO)
TFP_CLAIM_EXCLUSIVE_MUTEX - TEAR FREE PRESENT acquires exclusive mutex
USE_ANY_FRAME_FLIP_STEREO_MODE_FOR_TFP_AND_SWAPGROUP - Use ANY_FRAME instead of PAIR_FLIP flipping mode on Kepler when tearfree or swapgroup is enabled
ALLOW_SPLIT_STEREO_PRESENT_BLITS - Allow split stereo present blits to avoid tearing on the right-eye
DISABLE_DEEP_COLOR_SUPPORT - If bit is set, don't allow scanout from 10bpc buffer (create no dwm/gdi 10bpc primary buffer)
ENABLE_VIDPNOWNERSHIP_CHANGE_BLANKING_SKIPPING_ALL - If bit is set vipn blanking is forced for all vidpnownership changes (per default this is done for resource preallocation only).

DISABLE_VIDPNOWNERSHIP_CHANGE_BLANKING_SKIPPING - If bit is set vipn blanking is not skipped (per default this is done for resource preallocation). Overrides ENABLE_VIDPNOWNERSHIP_CHANGE_BLANKING_SKIPPING_FULL.
DISABLE_SCANOUT_COMP_IFLIP - If bit is set, don't allow scanoutComposition on iFlip on WDDM2
DISABLE_CSC_FOR_NON_DWM_PRIMARIES - If bit is set sw emulated color space conversion operations and bloating will be performed on primaries allocated by dwm only.
DISABLE_DWM_STEREO_DFLIP - If bit is set, don't allow DFlip for DWM stereo swapchain on WDDM2.3
DISABLE_INTERNAL_DISPLAY_MS_STEREO_MODES - If bit is set, display driver does not export MS stereo modes on internal (laptop) panels

EXPORT_HIGH_COLOR_CAPS_ON_10BPC_DISPLAYS - If bit is set, DXGK_MONITORLINKINFO_CAPABILITIES::HighColorSpace is exported for 10bpc capable (non-HDR) displays on Quadro (which allows FP16 desktops on RS4+).
DISALLOW_PRIVATE_CONTEXT_CHANNEL_FOR_NON_DWM - If bit is set, the usage of kmd's private context channel is disallowed for all applications besides dwm.
DISALLOW_PRIVATE_CONTEXT_CHANNEL_FOR_DWM - If bit is set, the usage of kmd's private context channel is disallowed for the dwm process.

ENABLE_SWAPGROUP_DWM_FLIP_BROADCASTING - If bit is set a swapgroup will control the flip of all heads (including dwm owned heads). Fallback option until verified that this is fixed and no longer needed.
WIN8_STEREO_ENFORCE_DIN_SIGNAL - If bit is set, 3pin DIN stereo signal is persistently enabled for active stereo mode.
ENABLE_SMOOTHSCALING_SUPPORT_ON_QUADRO - If bit is set, dsr aka smoothscaling aka hyperscaling is supported on Quadro boards.
ENABLE_DL_DSR_SUPPORT_ON_QUADRO - If bit is set, dl dsr is supported on Quadro boards.
DISALLOW_STEREO_OUTPUT_CONTROL_OVERRIDE - If bit is set, preferred stereo output target control via NVL_CLIENT_ARB_MODE_MODULE_STEREO_OUTPUT_CONTROL is disallowed.

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Write TO Host Staging Buffer Size
CustomSetting.Description: Set size of write staging buffer. If key is set to zero it will be ignored

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: Default - Set size of write staging buffer. If key is set to zero it will be ignored
